questions.question_en: Did the crop experience severe drought or heat stress during pod/grain filling?
questions.question_sw: Je, zao lilipata ukame mkali au joto kali wakati wa kujaa kwa nafaka?
questions.help_sw: Joto kali hudhoofisha kinga ya mmea.

questions.question_en: Are there visible signs of heavy insect damage in the field?
questions.question_sw: Je, kuna dalili za wazi za uharibifu wa wadudu shambani?
questions.help_en: Insects break the protective grain cover.
questions.help_sw: Wadudu huvunja ganda la kinga la nafaka.

questions.question_en: Has the crop been exposed to unexpected late-season rains?
questions.question_sw: Je, zao limekumbwa na mvua zisizotarajiwa za mwisho wa msimu?
questions.help_en: Rain at harvest triggers fungal growth.
questions.help_sw: Mvua wakati wa mavuno huchochea ukuaji wa kuvu.

questions.question_en: Was harvesting delayed by more than two weeks after maturity?
questions.question_sw: Je, uvunaji ulicheleweshwa kwa zaidi ya wiki mbili baada ya kukomaa?

questions.question_en: Are harvested cobs/pods left on the bare ground in the field?
questions.question_sw: Je, mahindi/maganda yaliyovunwa yanaachwa kwenye udongo mtupu shambani?

questions.question_en: Is the grain being dried directly on bare soil?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka inakaushwa moja kwa moja kwenye udongo?
questions.help_sw: Uchafuzi wa udongo ni hatari sana.

questions.question_en: Has the drying grain been re-wetted by dew or unexpected rain?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka inayokaushwa imelowa tena kwa umande au mvua isiyotarajiwa?
questions.help_sw: Kulowa tena huanzisha uzalishaji wa sumu.

questions.question_en: Are broken and discolored grains sorted out before shelling?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka zilizovunjika na zilizobadilika rangi zinachaguliwa kabla ya kupura?

questions.question_en: Does the mechanical sheller cause visible cracking or crushing of grains?
questions.question_sw: Je, mashine ya kupura husababisha kuvunjika kwa nafaka?

questions.question_en: Are storage bags placed directly on the floor without pallets?
questions.question_sw: Je, mifuko ya kuhifadhi inawekwa moja kwa moja sakafuni bila mbao?

questions.question_en: Does the storage roof leak during heavy rains?
questions.question_sw: Je, paa la stoo linavuja wakati wa mvua kubwa?

questions.question_en: Is the transport vehicle open and exposed to rain without a tarpaulin?
questions.question_sw: Je, gari la usafiri liko wazi na linapigwa na mvua bila turubai?
questions.help_sw: Mvua wakati wa usafiri husababisha kuoza.

questions.question_en: Do traders mix incoming wet bags with dry stock?
questions.question_sw: Je, wafanyabiashara wanachanganya mifuko mibichi na mzigo mkavu?

questions.question_en: Are moldy, discolored, or rejected grains fed to livestock?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka iliyooza inalishwa kwa mifugo?
questions.help_sw: Kuvu hutia sumu moja kwa moja kwenye maziwa.

questions.question_en: Is commercial dairy feed stored on the floor in damp conditions?
questions.question_sw: Je, chakula cha ng'ombe kinahifadhiwa sakafuni penye unyevunyevu?

questions.question_en: Is moldy grain burned for disposal?
questions.question_sw: Je, nafaka iliyooza inachomwa moto kama njia ya kutupa?

questions.question_en: Do you discard severely moldy feed safely away from food/feed chains?
questions.question_sw: Je, unatupa chakula kilichooza mbali na mnyororo wa chakula?
